sourceOfTruth.tokens: DeFlock Foundations.dc.html (upstream master, not included in this repo)
sourceOfTruth.geometry: DeFlock Icons v2.dc.html (upstream master, not included; extracted SVGs ship in assets/)
sourceOfTruth.index: DESIGN.md (upstream master, not included in this repo)

paper.role: stock: page, fields, knockout type; ~70% of any frame

ink.role: press: all type, linework, solids; never pure #000

red.role: the ONLY accent; 1-2 hits, <15% of frame; never red type on ink grounds
red.exception: LOUD MODE (X Templates §10): red floods the field, rationed, never default

gadsden.role: SANCTIONED EXCEPTION: DONT TREAD ON ME parody sticker lineage only

halftone.note: the rgba alpha IS the opacity budget; never stack layer opacity on top

misregistration.scope: display type + villain glyph only; never body or meta

stamp.css: border: 3px solid #d92b1c; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #f2ede3, inset 0 0 0 4.5px #d92b1c; transform: rotate(-4deg..4deg)

tornEdge.rule: jagged clip-path polygon, horizontal strips only, never all 4 sides

texture.printConversion: screen alpha does not print: rgba alpha budgets convert to halftone dot-size at fixed 9px pitch (Print Specs §06 rule 2)

layout.rule: square-native first; 4:5 and 9:16 are recompositions, never stretches

beats: BUILD meta strips + plate crawls + cuts
motion.law: riso has no tweens; when in doubt, CUT. Grain steps every 2-3 frames, never smooth.

voice.register: declarative watchdog: second person, present tense, slightly ominous
voice.puns: seasoning, never the entree; stamps/stickers/chrome only
voice.separators: · or periods; emdashes banned in artifact copy

footer.clean: artwork only: no footer, no ticker, no URL
footer.stickers: no URL at all, disclaimer included (operator rule)

ticker.rule: NEVER broken, hyphenated, or stacked. One line, always. Fallback ladder: slam wordmark -> quiet wordmark -> nothing.

emblem.role: universal community mark; pfp; both sets

mascot.role: sanctioned camera-headed crow mascot; the sole operator-ratified exception to doctrine 6 (2026-07-14); pfp/logo use allowed; plate remakes delivered 2026-07-14. note: file pointers repointed to in-repo assets/mascot/ for the standalone public repo (2026-07-14, pending operator ratification); superseded blue-era originals remain upstream

coinBadge.role: marked-set only; never beside wordmark; never pfp

villainGlyph.role: antagonist/subject matter only; never identity; always intact

banned: single-bird marks of any color (sole exception: the sanctioned camera-headed mascot, see marks.mascot)
camera-as-identity (the mascot's camera head is the ratified exception; the spider-eye villain glyph is never identity)

print.paper: uncoated only, warm off-white preferred; no gloss ever

doctrine: 1. NO camera damage/destruction imagery or language, ever. Cameras always intact. Extends to onomatopoeia and motion metaphors.
2. Two-variation model: clean set vs marked set. Marked is default for anything carrying $DEFLOCK.
3. No URLs on-screen except inside the unaffiliated disclaimer wording itself.
4. No emdashes in any artifact copy.
5. Only operator-verified facts: never invent amounts, deadlines, prices, vendors, or rules.

6. The official deflock.org blue crow is never community art. No single-bird marks — sole exception: the camera-headed crow mascot (operator-ratified 2026-07-14), distinguished from the deflock.org crow by its camera head; all other single-bird marks remain banned.
7. Camera depictions follow the locked anatomy: teardrop pod + hood, 4-6 LED spider-eye in teardrop recess, band mounts, thin pole + angled solar panel.
